rationale.fidelity: Precisely diagnoses the behavior mismatch and restores the focal-store assortment, capacity, Markov transitions, and expected-revenue objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Explains capacity opportunity cost, redirected demand, exit, controllable assortment, and feasible counterfactual.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Makes no ungrounded contribution claim; no traceable literature relationship is supplied.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly labels within-store substitution as assumed and identifies competitor visitation as unsupported and model-changing.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and rigorous, with mild repetition across diagnosis, mapping, and boundary sections.
rationale.overall: A complete and evidence-disciplined repair of the proposed mechanism mismatch.
